info.name: Toornify Tournaments API
info.description: Complete API collection for Toornify Tournament management

body.raw:
{
  "tournamentName": "BGMI Championship 2025",
  "selectedPlatform": "Mobile",
  "selectedTimezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
  "tournamentFormat": "Battle Royale",
  "registrationEndDate": "2025-01-15T23:59:59.000Z",
  "tournamentStartDate": "2025-01-20T10:00:00.000Z",
  "tournamentEndDate": "2025-01-25T18:00:00.000Z",
  "maxTeamMembers": 4,
  "minTeamMembers": 4,
  "maxTeams": 100,
  "minTeams": 16,
  "tournamentVisibility": "public",
  "gameType": "SQUAD",
  "game": "BGMI",
  "gameImage": "https://example.com/images/bgmi-banner.jpg",
  "rules": [
    "No cheating or hacking allowed",
    "All players must be present 15 minutes before match time",
    "Teams must have registered IGN (In-Game Name)",
    "Follow fair play rules"
  ],
  "sponsors": [
    {
      "name": "Red Bull",
      "logo": "https://example.com/sponsors/redbull.png",
      "website": "https://redbull.com"
    },
    {
      "name": "Logitech",
      "logo": "https://example.com/sponsors/logitech.png",
      "website": "https://logitech.com"
    }
  ],
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "prizeConfig": [
    {
      "position": 1,
      "prize": "₹50,000",
      "description": "First Prize"
    },
    {
      "position": 2,
      "prize": "₹30,000",
      "description": "Second Prize"
    },
    {
      "position": 3,
      "prize": "₹20,000",
      "description": "Third Prize"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create a new tournament. Requires organizer email to exist in UserModel and game name to exist in Games collection.
Retrieve all tournaments from the database.
Get tournament details by ID with populated organizer and game information.
Create a tournament with minimal required fields for quick testing.
